evidence_summary: Reviewed the canonical round-220 worktree against the merged predecessor baseline 7616109, where the round branch tip and merge-base both equal the accepted round-219 merge commit and the selected implementation lives as an uncommitted round-owned diff. The implementation-owned diff stays limited to test/Research/P5ClearBoundarySpec.hs, test/PipelineSpec.hs, and test/ElaborationSpec.hs, while the concurrent diff in orchestrator/state.json, orchestrator/roadmap.md, orchestrator/verification.md, orchestrator/retry-subloop.md, the untracked rev-025 bundle, and the untracked round directory is controller-owned bookkeeping outside implementation scope. sameLaneNonupleAliasFrameClearBoundaryExpr is now explicit on the research, pipeline, and elaboration surfaces; the merged first eight anchors, sameLaneAliasFrameClearBoundaryExpr predecessor truth, the selected same-wrapper nested-forall packet, checked-authoritative parity, fail-closed contrasts, and the deeper-alias-shell boundary all remain green. ./scripts/thesis-conformance-gate.sh passed, and cabal build all && cabal test passed with 1365 examples, 0 failures.
